criteria.Details: Local control channel is bound to named-pipe transport by default (\\.\pipe\FenrirEndpointLocalApi).
Local role authorization enforces direct-allow or request-only routing across status, patch-install, and service-action paths.
Break-glass control toggled enable/disable and restored prior state successfully for local recovery governance.
Mirrored from phase5_pam_request_queue_visibility: Endpoint snapshot surfaced pending PAM requests and PAM health posture from local runtime paths.
Mirrored from phase5_pam_audit_visibility: Endpoint snapshot exposed PAM approval/denial counts from the local audit journal.
Mirrored from phase5_household_role_policy_governance: Fenrir validated household role policy SID lists, but owner SID is not configured yet.
criteria.Remediation: Set the owner SID through local.household.roles.apply before enforcing long-lived household role governance.

criteria.Details: Mirrored from phase5_admin_baseline_persistence: Runtime database persisted local admin baseline snapshot records and latest-baseline lookup succeeded.

additionalPhase6Checks.name: Phase 6 integrated posture snapshot
additionalPhase6Checks.details: Unified endpoint snapshot exposed threat, patch debt, reboot state, PAM queue/history, and local-admin posture signals together.

additionalPhase6Checks.name: Phase 6 local posture output coverage
additionalPhase6Checks.details: Local posture output preserved patch history, manual/unsupported software debt, Windows update status, and PAM decision history for dashboard/reporting surfaces.
